# Text to Speech
**ID:** text-to-speech  
**Type:** Atomic  
**Level:** IV  
**Rarity:** Common  
**Status:** Provisional

---

## Description
Synthesizes natural-sounding speech audio from text input, supporting voice cloning and prosody control.

## Prerequisites
_None._

## Unlocks
- [Voice Agent](../composite/voice-agent.md)
